warnings.message: Some PDF pages have no strong text-window match in the EPUB
Some dense PDF word windows are missing from the EPUB and may indicate sliced sentence interiors
Some paragraphs begin with large bare numbers that may be broken reference continuations
Some roman numeral headings appear in body paragraphs instead of centered heading elements
Some EPUB enumerators look like possible sequence jumps and need triage
Repeated word windows may indicate ghost-layer duplication

Level 2 — Nested Proofs & Subdivisions Marked by parenthesized Arabic numbers (e.g., (1.), (2.) ) or bracketed Arabic numbers (e.g., [1.], [2.] ). These represent secondary theological proofs and are indented with a subtle, thin vertical blue hairline on the left.
